> Web Engineering Manager & Frontend Architect | Composable Platforms, Design Systems & DevEx

## Profile

**Name:** Vicente Opaso  
**Title:** Web Engineering Manager & Frontend Architect  
**Location:** Europe  
**Languages:** Spanish (Native), English (C2)

25+ years designing and scaling high-performance digital platforms across enterprise, e-commerce, and mission-critical environments. Specializes in composable architecture, Design Systems, and Developer Experience.

## Experience Summary

| Company | Role | Period | Focus |
|---------|------|--------|-------|
| Nexthink | Web Engineering Manager | 2025 | Composable platform, Next.js, Vercel |
| EUROCONTROL | Technical Application Owner | 2025 | Aviation systems, Design System |
| Carlsberg Group | Frontend Solutions Architect | 2020-2024 | B2B platforms, Malty Design System |
| Greygoo | Co-founder | 2012-2019 | Digital studio, Fortune 500 clients |
| Nokia Networks | RF Engineer | 2001-2011 | Telecommunications |

## Core Skills

**Master:** TypeScript, React, Next.js, Design Systems, DevEx, CI/CD  
**Advanced:** AWS, GraphQL, Tailwind CSS, Playwright, Vitest

## Site Architecture

```
/en                    Home page + contact form
/en/cv                 Full CV
/en/tech-stack         Technical details
/en/accessibility      WCAG 2.1 AA statement
/en/technical-governance Technical governance
/es/*                  Spanish locale
```

**Stack:** Next.js 16 (App Router) | TypeScript | Tailwind CSS v4 | Vercel

## Publications

1. Hardening Agentic Experience (AX) in an AI-First Codebase (2025)
2. Building My Website Through Spec-Driven Development (2025)
3. Empowering Design Systems: Communities of Practice (2024)

## Contact

- Website: https://opa.so
- LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/vicenteopaso
- GitHub: github.com/vicenteopaso

## AI Governance

This site implements strict AI guardrails:
- Governance: `CONSTITUTION.md` > `sdd.yaml` > ADRs > docs > code
- Security: Turnstile, sanitization, rate limiting
- Accessibility: WCAG 2.1 AA minimum
- Testing: 90% coverage required

## AI & MCP Interfaces

- Short context: `/llms.txt`
- Full context: `/llms-full.txt`
- MCP config: `/.well-known/mcp.json`
- Content API example: `/api/content/en/tech-stack` (pattern: `/api/content/{lang}/{slug}`, slugs: about, accessibility, cookie-policy, privacy-policy, tech-stack, technical-governance)
- Profile API: `/api/profile/{lang}`

## WebMCP Tools (Browser)

When a WebMCP-capable client is present, the site exposes read-only tools:
- `get_site_overview` — returns `/llms.txt`
- `get_site_context` — returns `/llms-full.txt`
- `get_content` — returns localized markdown via `/api/content/{lang}/{slug}`
- `list_content_slugs` — lists available slugs
